title: Set of 3 Apothecary Jar Glass, Glass Apothecary Jars with Lids, Clear Candy Jars for Candy Buffet, Decorative Jar for Display, Party and Wedding, Elegant Candy Canisters Set
description:
About this item
Attention: The lids are fitted to each specific glass, make sure to use them according to our pictures. Otherwise the lids will not fit perfectly.
HANDBLOWN GLASS JAR: Stella Baicø set of 3 apothecary jars are made of sturdy high quality hand-blown glass. Each clear glass apothecary jar is unique. A few amount of air bubbles is normal.
DIFFERENT SIZES: Stella Baicø candy jar set includes 3 elegant candy glass jars in varying shapes and sizes. The size of the candy jars wiht lid is approximately 8.4" (H) x 4.5" (D), 8.4" (H) x 4.4" (D), 10.5" (H) x 4.4 "(D). Their capacities are 20 ounces, 23 ounces, and 28 ounces, respectively.
BEAUTIFUL SHAPE: Add a dash of sophistication to your party or your household design with Stella Baicø decorative jars. Each jar is made of clear glass and features a different size and a unique design that includes a spacious interior and a handled lid.
IDEAL GIFT OPTION: These candy canister set are the perfect way to add festive holiday cheer to your home, for halloween, thanksgiving, christmas, display, parties, wedding. The elegant shape and lightweight design is guaranteed to impress your guest.
Wide Mouth Opening: The Wide Mouth Makes Filling and Accessing Contents Easy, Perfect for Storing and Organizing Small Items in the Bathroom, Laundry Room, or Kitchen.
Decorative Lids: Each Jar Comes with a Decorative Lid, Ensuring Contents Stay Fresh and Dust-Free, While Adding a Finishing Touch to Your Decorative Displays.
